summary: Iteration 132 - Frontend testing for 2 bug fixes and 7 pillar Services tab additions. All 8 test cases PASSED.

enjoy_bundles_credentials_crash_fix.details: Navigated to admin?tab=enjoy, scrolled to tabs, clicked Bundles tab. No 'credentials is not defined' ReferenceError crash. Page shows 'No bundles found. Add your first bundle!' cleanly. Tabs visible: Experiences | RSVPs | Partners | Products | Bundles | Services | Settings
enjoy_bundles_credentials_crash_fix.note: Console showed 405 error from bundle API endpoint (pre-existing issue unrelated to this fix), but the component rendered without crash.
enjoy_bundles_credentials_crash_fix.fix_verified: EnjoyManager.jsx line 819 - PillarBundlesTab no longer has credentials={credentials} prop

fit_services_tab.details: admin?tab=fit > Services tab shows '🏋 Fit Services - 23 services found'. Services listed: Fitness Assessment & Programme Design, Personal Training Programme, Weight Management Programme, Hydrotherapy Sessions, Senior Mobility Programme, etc.

farewell_services_tab.details: admin?tab=farewell > Services tab shows '8 services found'. No errors.

emergency_services_tab.details: admin?tab=emergency > Services tab shows '8 services found'. No errors.

learn_services_tab.details: admin?tab=learn > Services tab shows '12 services found'. No errors.

paperwork_services_tab.details: admin?tab=paperwork > Services tab shows '16 services found'. No errors.

advisory_services_tab.details: admin?tab=advisory > Services tab shows '8 services found'. No errors.

adopt_services_tab.details: admin?tab=adopt > Services tab visible in tab row (Pets | Applications | Foster | Events | Shelters | Bundles | Experiences | Services). Tab loads without error. 0 services for adopt pillar - acceptable per spec.

code_review_verified.EnjoyManager.jsx: Line 819: PillarBundlesTab has pillar='enjoy' and accentColor='purple' only - credentials prop correctly removed
code_review_verified.FitManager.jsx: Line 507: TabsTrigger value='services' with data-testid='fit-tab-services'. Line 958-960: PillarServicesTab pillar='fit'
code_review_verified.FarewellManager.jsx: Line 388: TabsTrigger value='services' with data-testid='farewell-tab-services'. Line 789: PillarServicesTab pillar='farewell'
code_review_verified.EmergencyManager.jsx: Line 400: TabsTrigger value='services'. Line 689: PillarServicesTab pillar='emergency'
code_review_verified.LearnManager.jsx: Line 523: TabsTrigger value='services'. Line 946: PillarServicesTab pillar='learn'
code_review_verified.PaperworkManager.jsx: Line 418: TabsTrigger value='services'. Line 764: PillarServicesTab pillar='paperwork'
code_review_verified.AdvisoryManager.jsx: Line 398: TabsTrigger value='services'. Line 684: PillarServicesTab pillar='advisory'
code_review_verified.AdoptManager.jsx: Line 425: TabsTrigger value='services'. Line 679: PillarServicesTab pillar='adopt'

critical_code_review_comments: EnjoyManager Bundles tab shows 405 error from bundle API - pre-existing issue, not related to this fix. The UI renders cleanly showing empty state.
Adopt Services tab shows 0 services - acceptable as adopt pillar has no services seeded (per spec)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 fixes from iteration_132 verified: (1) Enjoy Bundles tab no longer crashes (credentials prop removed), (2-8) Services tabs added to Fit/Farewell/Emergency/Learn/Paperwork/Advisory/Adopt pillars - all working. Services counts: Fit=23, Farewell=8, Emergency=8, Learn=12, Paperwork=16, Advisory=8, Adopt=0. Navigate with admin?tab={pillar} and click Services tab (in second row for Adopt). Enjoy also has its own Services tab at line 825-830 which was pre-existing.
